channel.name: life-updates
channel.topic: Share daily little things, a bug you solved, a friend you met, or general life updates!

messages.content:
Experimental channel for posting what you did today, what happened, anything big and small

Focusing on small wins rewires our subconscious, bring your mind in the present, reduces stress and anxiety, and gives dopamine boosts to help stay consistent
Like i bought this little guy to cure my adhd

today was holiday from daily hectic college schedule, so just rested, watched half movie 
(500 days of summer)
oh shoot, well i have started to go gym again , after my leg inury , ig thats a good win , even tho the piccolo guy hasnt responded to my mail of setting up a meeting , but we wait we wait
Lmao they were really good man
Love this kind of flavour cos its healthy and delicious
They don't taste as good as ferero rocher but def feels better than ferero rocher
Dates are eaten to reduce diabetes lol
Its so hard to eat tasty desserts as a conscious eater
Not if you ate pairs of it
how much protein in this bish ?
FERERO ROCHER gold standard of chocoloates
Very expensive but delicious as hell
The last time i ate them was b4 covid so idk if quality is changed
I agree too much of anything is bad but pairs are fine
I eat dates all the time
My random blood sugar test was around 100 recently that is pretty good considering i just gobbled a plate of white rice
the ice-cream sandwich i eat has 3g
i eat 2 easy 6g of protien for rounding shit off
i mean they are like 3 bites
how long have you been going to the gym tho >
Deserts are mostly for flavour na
I used to go in vacations and covid, counting all that 1.5 years
But last serious session was around 6 months
Thats wen i got that huge pump
i wouldnt call myself jacked , tho i am in fair enough shape, enough to get the ladies lol
Dec 2024 - may 2025, after that i have been going just 2-3 times a week
i have been going for around the same time , but i am not consistent , since i change sports , a lot , and i am a bit moody
Bro yk actually girls prefer slightly fatty and chubby men over jacked dudes?
There are several studies about it
well my women prefer abs , so idk
Pair are bad impairs are the go to
Yeah sports are undeniably more fun imo
yeah , what sports have you played ?
What inglis doesnt make sense to my head anymore
same , i just cant play soccer , i suck at it ,i am really good at basketball and badminton , tho i have played table tennis ,swimming , billiards , tennis , shit like that
Why Americans call their rugby football when they pick it with their hands
Well they didn’t create English to do that criminality to it😭

I played tenis in districts, got bored and loved basketball a lot, thrn i joined American football and loved it soooo much dude, then volleyball for a bit, basketball again

And ofc gully cricket and badminton toh since childhood. Swimming not a lot. And side stuff like dodge ball, table tennis bhi chalte rhta
Btw the word soccer was a slang term in the uk between students
did you grow up in india ? i dont think so
cause idk much places in india where you can play american football, tho it does look pretty fun
Yeah man, except american football, u did everything else too ryt
yeah american football , is no no ,
My school was very bullish on sports, we had many ppl going national...
It was a rich kid school
Bro i used to be so fucking good at balls
Then jee came and destroyed everything
How dy get time for gym and basketball both?
Holy crap how are placements going
i go gym at 6:30 , do gym till 7:15 and then play basketball till 8-9
but i am looking into getting hired for a youtuber or shit like that
even if it is just a contract
whatever , can be a project i make for them over a monthly stipend
Content researchers are a good one
Good ones are hard to find
yeah i am pretty good at it
i think everybody , messages on insta , so have to do something different

i was wondering why you were so impressed
After gym i dun wanna do anything
oh , yeah my cardio is top notch
I unfortunately have to walk for 20 minutes *before* gym
yk last summer , what i used to do , my badminton court and basketball court are side by side , so i play 1 match of badminton then play basketball and then back and forth
U have a lot of stamina
yeah rn i wish i could just get a internship or a job , i have no like expectations from college
my teacher said they will take a mock interview , i was happy , then he said web dev is a gimmick only participate if yk C or C++
lol , i never went college from that day
I mean you can get your friends to send you the lecture content is they are really ur friends
lecture content or whattttt ???? how to print helloo world in c lol
half my fucking class dont know how to do that
Get them from your professor then
but my proffesor is teaching this .....
Get his number and tell him something like I can’t come in the semester or something can you send me the lectures content and information me abt the exam time and stuff u know get creative
Still you never know 1 week makes a difference
i havent been to college for the pas 3-4 months
i still score top 10 of my semester
cause they dont teach shit, i can study the whole syllabus in 1 hour
Shit you guys study during summer ☠️
ok yk what lets brainstorm , why hasnt htat piccolo yt guy , havent replied to my mail of setting a up a metting
even tho he likes my project idea
i am running out of patience
Let’s do something better with our lives
I aint reading this wall of text
You guys don't study during summer?

getting a job isn't a matter of season lol

2025 registration is already closed . Organisation are announced around febuary each year in the official Gsoc site
Anyways you need good knowledge to contribute

bhai it’s called async await
i got wet (promise pending)
it rained (callback fired)
now i am dry (resolved)
GSoC is over this year. Organizations are announced in Feb each year and then applications start.
If you don't mind me asking
Filtered out some orgs based on my tech stack, started contributing after that.

When i was in school & jee coaching i enjoyed attending my classes and studying it, i knew im just doing it for an exam but i still enjoyed going to class. Maybe i knew i just have to study it few years more then i can join a college? Maybe it were the friends i had in my class. I dont know.
But now that im in college, i hate going to classes, it feels like a job. The only reason i can think of is that it depends on the teacher teaching. All of my subjects except data structures and web dev are irrelevant to my goal. But i still hate web dev classes more than the maths classes cause the math teacher is better than the web dev one.
I wanna be like my school self again, not attending lectures just for the 75% attendance requirement and actually enjoying it instead
how often do you go outside (except clg)
do you play any outdoor sports
None cause i dont get time
Are u tryna flirt with me
doesnt want us to know his secrets
that is so relatable even in jee it wasn't this bad i genuinely enjoyed class college is boring and fuck 75% attendance criteria.
